note: Additional resources on the Results page (issue #71). One general-audience external link per domain, from an established public-health, professional, or nonprofit body publishing free developmental guidance for families — never a single clinician, blog, or product vendor, and never autism-specific branding (this app never states or implies a diagnosis, and the linked orgs are chosen to match, covering the domain generally rather than any one condition). Every URL was live-checked at authoring time (2026-07-09) but needs advisor sign-off on source appropriateness before a release branch, plus a periodic live-link check thereafter (links can move). AI-matched, personalized resources are a deliberate future paid-tier feature per the issue text — this is a static, versioned list only, same as every other content file (CLAUDE.md §5).

resources.label: Communication milestones by age
resources.description: Free guidance from speech-language professionals on typical communication development and when to ask for an evaluation.

resources.label: Social and emotional milestones by age
resources.description: A free, printable checklist of milestones from 2 months through 5 years, including social interaction.
resources.source: CDC — Learn the Signs. Act Early.

resources.label: Helping young children build self-control
resources.description: Practical, non-judgemental tips on repeating/self-soothing behaviours and building self-control at home.

resources.label: Understanding sensory processing
resources.description: An introduction to how children process sensory input and practical everyday support ideas.

resources.label: Understanding learning and thinking differences
resources.description: A plain-language explainer on learning differences and how families can support a child's own learning style.

resources.label: Supporting a child's attention at home
resources.description: Parent-facing guidance and free training on attention and focus from a national nonprofit.

resources.label: Motor development tool
resources.description: A free tool from pediatricians to check in on gross and fine motor development.

resources.label: Building emotional regulation skills together
resources.description: How caregivers can co-regulate with a child to build lasting self-regulation skills.

resources.label: Free life-skills toolkit for families
resources.description: Downloadable tools for building everyday life and self-help skills at a child's own pace.
